taxonomy: Lithocardium niveum is a genus of flowering plant in the family Santalaceae. However, more specifically, Lithocardium niveum is classified as a species within the family Santalaceae, but it appears to be a synonym of  Comandra umbellulata, which belongs to the family Santalaceae. More specifically, Comandra umbellulata is classified within the order Santalales. The Santalales order is part of the larger clade of flowering plants known as the angiosperms. This classification is based on the APG IV system of plant taxonomy.
